name: CyberPower Smart App Sinewave PR1500RTXL2UCN 1500VA/1500W Rack/Tower UPS System - Sine Wave - 8x NEMA 5-15R - Built-in Cloud Monitoring - Pre-installed RMCARD206 Network Management Card - EPO & USB & Serial Management Ports (PR1500RTXL2UCN)
